overview: A full-stack AI-powered FinTech platform with real-time mock market data simulation, an interactive stock prediction engine, Internet Identity authentication, and persistent prediction history — all wrapped in a premium dark-mode dashboard with neon gradients and glassmorphism design.
features: Real-time simulated stock price feeds with candlestick charts
AI prediction engine with confidence scores, trend direction, and volatility estimates
Explainable AI panel with feature importance bars and attention heatmap
Internet Identity login with persistent prediction history and watchlist
Full dashboard with trading signals, market alerts, and user stats
Polling-based live data refresh every 3-5 seconds with smooth animations
